_meta.description: Machine-readable component map. Read before exploring the codebase. Update as part of every feature branch that adds or moves components.
_meta.upstream_debt_legend: Files/dirs still using HestiaCP-specific paths (/usr/local/hestia, /etc/hestiacp, hestia-nginx, hestia-php) that need migration to HestiaRE conventions.

install_paths.shell_profile: /etc/profile.d/hestia.sh (0600, root-only — #210; non-root login shells skip it via /etc/profile's [ -r ] test)
install_paths.note: install_root is intentionally identical to HestiaCP — only instance_config changed (/etc/hestiacp → /etc/hestia). See PATHS.md for full reference.

cli_commands.description: All CLI commands. h-* prefix is HestiaRE-native (renamed from v-* in Issue #22). v-* symlinks for HestiaCP compatibility added in Issue #23. No hl-* commands.

symlink_policy.baseline: Each h-* command that predated Issue #23 has one v-* symlink. New h-* commands created after Issue #23 get NO v-* symlink — the v-* name never existed.
symlink_policy.escalation_rule: When a command is substantially rewritten and diverges significantly from its HestiaCP upstream equivalent, its v-* symlink is removed. Rationale: prevent accidental upstream cherry-picks onto an internally incompatible implementation. Applied in Issue #54 (v-add-sys-roundcube removed after total rewrite for OS-package migration).
symlink_policy.deletion: When removing an h-* command: remove its v-* symlink too — no orphans.

dns.note: Only h-list-mail-domain-dkim-dns retained — DNS zone management removed in Issue #58

issues: $HESTIA variable itself is unchanged (/usr/local/hestia) — no migration needed in bin/*
h-add-cron-hestia-autoupdate references HestiaCP update mechanism — remove or replace (see PATHS.md Q5)

func_libraries.description: Shared bash function libraries sourced by all CLI commands and the installer. Core runtime dependency.

file_roles.main.sh: Core utilities: source_conf(), check_result(), output formatting, logging, JSON/shell serialization
file_roles.domain.sh: Domain validation and template checking for web and mail
file_roles.rebuild.sh: User and domain rebuild logic — regenerates service configs from HestiaRE data
file_roles.syshealth.sh: System health monitoring, RRD graph generation, service status checks
file_roles.db.sh: MySQL/MariaDB and PostgreSQL connection helpers, host configuration
file_roles.backup.sh: Local, FTP, and Restic backup/restore handlers with retention logic
file_roles.ip.sh: IP address validation, RDNS checking, IPv4/IPv6 utilities

issues: $HESTIA variable unchanged (/usr/local/hestia) — no path migration needed in func/*

web_panel.description: Plain-PHP control panel UI. No framework. Action-based routing via directory structure. Served by Caddy + PHP 8.3 FPM (hestia-php.service) on port 8083.

panel_vendor.strategy: No Composer at install time. No vendor/ in repo. OS packages and Eigenbau only.

os_packages.libphp-phpmailer: deb12=6.6.3 / ub24=6.8.1 / deb13=6.9.3 — panel email sending — LGPL-2.1-only — installed by install_panel stage

inline_libs.web/inc/lib/quoteshellarg.php: Third-party: inlined from hestiacp/phpquoteshellarg v1.1.0 (Unlicense). Keeps namespace Hestiacp\quoteshellarg intact. See VENDORED.json and security note in file header.
inline_libs.web/inc/lib/totp.php: Eigenbau: RFC 6238 TOTP (secret gen, URI builder, verify). No upstream, no deps.
inline_libs.web/inc/lib/qrcode.php: Eigenbau: single-file SVG QR code generator (byte mode, ECC-M, v1-10). No upstream, no deps.
inline_libs.web/inc/cloudflare-ip.php: Eigenbau: static Cloudflare CIDR list. Update from cloudflare.com/ips-v4 and /ips-v6 when ranges change.

removed: robthree/twofactorauth — removed in Issue #56, replaced by web/inc/lib/totp.php (Eigenbau)
phpmailer/phpmailer — removed in Issue #56, replaced by OS package libphp-phpmailer (install_panel stage)
chillerlan/php-qrcode + php-settings-container — removed in Issue #56, replaced by web/inc/lib/qrcode.php (Eigenbau)

pma_sso.description: phpMyAdmin SSO without REST API (#145): web/sso/phpmyadmin/ runs h-add-database-sso-token via panel sudo (temp DB user + one-time handoff file /run/hestia-sso/<token>, root:caddy 0730/640); share/phpmyadmin/hestia-sso.php (PMA pool, unprivileged) consumes the token and opens the signon session. Enable/disable: h-add-sys-pma-sso / h-delete-sys-pma-sso; PHPMYADMIN_KEY is only the enabled flag.

issues: PHP files reference /usr/local/hestia paths in includes — install root is unchanged so paths are correct, but hardcoded (not using a constant)
web/inc/mail-wrapper.php shebang: updated to #!/usr/bin/php8.3 in Issue #25
Panel branding still references HestiaCP in some locale strings

panel_assets.description: Panel frontend assets, served as-is by Panel-Caddy — no build step, no Node/npm (#248). JS: native ES modules from web/js/src/ (explicit .js import extensions). CSS: native nesting, plain min-width media queries, browser resolves @import chains. Browser baseline: adr-browser-baseline.md (Chrome/Edge 120, Firefox 117, Safari 17.2) with CSS-only warning banner in web/templates/header.php.
panel_assets.themes: Shipped: web/css/src/themes/*.css — light is the base stylesheet (css.php always loads it), overlays: dark, dark-tonal (@import dark.css + tonal green icon ladder, #260/#269), light-flat, light-green (dark green primary via brand-token redefinition, #269). Renames #269: default→light, flat→light-flat; vestia removed #259 — THEME migration + stale-file cleanup in func/helper.sh migrate_data_layout. Brand tokens --brand-* (green/anthracite, #259) in light.css :root, dark.css overrides greens brighter. Custom: web/css/src/themes/custom/*.css (instance data, gitignored). Listed by bin/h-list-sys-themes via HESTIA_THEMES/HESTIA_THEMES_CUSTOM (func/main.sh).
panel_assets.vendored: web/js/vendor/ (Alpine.js + collapse), web/css/vendor/ (normalize.css, Font Awesome Free solid-only). Manifest: VENDORED.json; snapshot branches: upstream/alpinejs, upstream/normalize-css, upstream/fontawesome. Updater: share/upstream/update-web-vendor.sh (--check read-only version report vs VENDORED.json; --fetch <asset>[@version] rebuilds one snapshot branch, publisher-hash-verified); hooked into share/upstream/sync-upstream.sh (author's sync instance).

installer.description: Service config templates and data distributed during install. Consumed by Makefile install-* targets. hst-install-debian.sh and hst-install-ubuntu.sh removed in Issue #26b — replaced by Makefile targets.
installer.note: Monolithic bash installers removed in Issue #26b. install/hst-install.sh removed in Issue #26d. Install logic: Makefile (removed) → Justfile #102 → pure-bash bin/h-install-hestia + func/wizard.sh + func/helper.sh in Issue #112 (just removed). See make_release component.

panel_caddy_service.description: Caddy config for the HestiaRE admin panel on port 8083. Replaces the compiled hestia-nginx package. Handles PHP via FastCGI and X-Accel-Redirect for file downloads.
notes: X-Accel-Redirect handled via handle_response in reverse_proxy block
web/list/rrd/image.php updated to send absolute path for X-Accel-Redirect
File manager /fm/* served via handle block with uri strip_prefix
Web terminal removed in Issue #59 — /_shell/ location absent by design

Panel apps under /etc/caddy/apps/*.conf: phpMyAdmin/phpPgAdmin (h-change-sys-db-alias) and rspamd controller UI (installer mail stage, Issue #301). rspamd: /rspamd/* is forward_auth-gated against the admin panel session (web/rspamd-auth.php) then proxied to the controller's unix socket /run/rspamd/controller.sock (X-Forwarded-* stripped). The controller binds that socket (mode 0660, group _rspamd) instead of TCP localhost so no local shell user can read it; installer adds caddy to the _rspamd group. Shown in-panel via the iframe page web/list/rspamd/. Installer also sets password+enable_password overriding the stock q1 default (defense in depth)

panel_php_service.description: Dedicated PHP-FPM service for the HestiaRE panel. Runs as hestia-php.service using Sury php8.3-fpm binary with an isolated pool. Replaces compiled hestia-php package.
panel_php_service.confd_isolation: The panel FPM runs with PHP_INI_SCAN_DIR=/etc/php/hestia/fpm/conf.d (set in hestia-php-fpm) so it loads a curated extension set (opcache, DB, curl, mbstring, gmp, zip, gettext, ftp, dom) independent of the customer version's conf.d (#272). hestia-php-confd rebuilds it from the pinned version's mods-available; called by install_panel, h-change-sys-panel-php, and migrate_data_layout. Wrapper falls back to the default scan dir if unbuilt.
panel_php_service.version_indirection: The panel PHP version is the single source of truth in /etc/php/hestia/php-version (written by h-install-hestia, read by the hestia-php / hestia-php-fpm wrappers). h-change-sys-panel-php (#272) rewrites it + restarts hestia-php; h-delete-web-php refuses to remove the pinned version. Distinct from h-change-sys-php (default web PHP).
panel_php_service.note: gettext included in php8.3-common (auto dep of php8.3-fpm). Installer integration completed in Issue #26a.

make_release.description: Pure-bash installer. install.sh (bootstrap) → func/wizard.sh (manifest-driven Q&A → /etc/hestia/install.conf) → bin/h-install-hestia (non-interactive, COMPONENT_*-gated). Migrated from Justfile/just/* to bash h-* commands in Issue #112 (epic); just removed (was Makefile→Justfile in #102, Justfile→bash in #112).

structure.install.sh: Bootstrap (curl-able): root + OS detect, apt prereqs (curl jq whiptail gnupg ca-certificates — no just), --dev source setup, fetch+extract release tarball, run func/wizard.sh, seed_hestia_etc, hand off to bin/h-install-hestia.
structure.func/wizard.sh: Interactive whiptail wizard (bash fallback), manifest-driven: pre-questions + preset + dynamic version discovery + component questions; writes /etc/hestia/install.conf. Runnable standalone (hestia configure).
structure.func/helper.sh: hestia_apt (spinner + apt log split), load_os_profile (OS_ID/CODENAME/RELEASE/EXIM_USR/BASE_PKGS_EXTRA for deb12/deb13/ub24/ub26), seed_hestia_etc (hestia.env + profile.d + seed hestia.conf).
structure.bin/h-install-hestia: Non-interactive orchestrator: validates /etc/hestia, sources hestia.env+main.sh+helper.sh+install.conf, runs stages gated by COMPONENT_*. Idempotent via .done.* sentinels (exit→return).
structure.bin/hestia: Umbrella dispatcher: hestia install|configure|update|uninstall|status (no v-* alias).
structure.bin/h-update-hestia: Update whole distribution from release tarball (+ --check); stops/starts hestia around copy. Does NOT use the legacy h-update-sys-hestia* apt/git updaters (removal tracked in #128).
structure.bin/h-uninstall-hestia: Conservative uninstall (keeps /home + DBs always; --purge removes packages + /usr/local/hestia + /etc/hestia).
structure.bin/h-list-sys-install: Status report: version, source, OS, profile, .done.* phases, COMPONENT_*.

stages.install_base: APT repos (Sury always; MariaDB only for an external-repo version), base packages, system users, SSH hardening, NTP, /proc
stages.install_web: nginx + apache2 per WEB_SERVER with port model #247 (BOTH: nginx proxy 80/443 -> apache2 8080/8443; APACHE/NGINX alone: 80/443; Listen per IP via h-add-sys-ip, ports.conf emptied, mod_remoteip for client IP behind proxy), multi-PHP via COMPONENT_PHP_MULTIPHP_VERSIONS when sury_multi, web pool
stages.install_db: MariaDB (version from COMPONENT_DB_MARIADB_VERSION); phpMyAdmin/PostgreSQL/Redis per components
stages.install_mail: exim4, dovecot (version-aware), rspamd (optional), webmailer roundcube/snappymail — only if COMPONENT_MAIL_BLOCK_PRESENT
stages.configure_hestia: sudoers, v-* symlinks, SSL cert, admin user, firewall, default domain, crontab; writes .done.configure
stages.install_tools: always-installed utilities + selected TOOLS_SELECTION + composer + wp-cli
stages.finalize_install: start hestia.service, schedule LE host cert, final apt upgrade, print credentials

make_release.sentinel_files: /etc/hestia/.done.{base,panel,web,db,mail,security,addons,configure} — presence skips that stage (return 0, NOT exit)
make_release.presets: 7 manifest presets (standard/compact/latest/singlephp/nomail/mailonly/custom) drive COMPONENT_* in the wizard; h-install-hestia consumes COMPONENT_* directly (no profile-name dispatch)
make_release.bootstrap_flow: curl | bash install.sh → OS detect → apt prereqs → download+extract tarball → func/wizard.sh → seed_hestia_etc → bin/h-install-hestia
make_release.install_conf: /etc/hestia/install.conf — written by func/wizard.sh; HESTIA_* params + COMPONENT_* selections; sourced by h-install-hestia; COMPONENT_* to be updated by h-add-*/h-remove-* (issue #103)

pr_api.description: Gitea API integration for PR creation. Used in the CLAUDE.md workflow. Token from $GITEA_TOKEN env var.

minimal_profile: standard minus apache2 and mail stack

panel_php.reference_version_source: share/manifest.json -> components.PANEL_PHP.reference_version (#272): single source for installer PHP_VER + wizard checklist lock; always routed through h-add-web-php for the full extension set

upstream_debt_summary.note: 571 total flagged files; 563 had /etc/hestiacp references migrated to /etc/hestia in Issue #30; src/ directory and install/hst-install.sh deleted in Issue #26d — build_tools component removed. 9 web/ files remain — /usr/local/hestia refs are structurally correct (install root unchanged) except mail-wrapper shebang (deferred Issue #25)

primary_issues.detail: bin/* and func/* sourced /etc/hestiacp/hestia.conf — migrated to /etc/hestia/hestia.conf in Issue #30, renamed to /etc/hestia/hestia.env in Issue #81
Install root stays /usr/local/hestia — $HESTIA is already correct in all bin/* files
hestia-nginx/php/web-terminal removed; Caddy+hestia-php.service added; bind/vsftpd/spamd removed; upgrade/versions/ deleted — completed Issue #26a
